skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Stem-and-leaf, box-and-whisker and comparative displays
skills.description: Represent and compare raw data using stem-and-leaf diagrams, box plots and related summaries.
common_errors: Misplacing quartiles in an ordered list
Comparing spread using only the range
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Probability & Statistics 1, section 5.1

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Histograms and frequency density
skills.description: Draw and interpret histograms for grouped data with unequal class widths.
common_errors: Plotting frequency instead of frequency density
Using inconsistent class widths
skills.official_syllabus_reference: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 syllabus for 2023, 2024 and 2025, Subject content, Probability & Statistics 1, section 5.1

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Cumulative frequency and percentiles
skills.description: Use cumulative frequency graphs to estimate medians, quartiles, percentiles and counts.
common_errors: Reading from class midpoints instead of boundaries
Using less-than values as exact data

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Mean, variance, standard deviation and coding
skills.description: Calculate and transform measures of location and spread, including coded data and grouped estimates.
common_errors: Using n minus 1 instead of n for syllabus variance
Forgetting to reverse coding transformations

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Permutations and arrangements with restrictions
skills.description: Count arrangements of objects, including repeated letters and positional restrictions.
common_errors: Not dividing by repeated factorials
Treating a grouped block as multiple objects

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Combinations and selections with restrictions
skills.description: Count selections and committees using combinations, complementary cases and restrictions.
common_errors: Counting ordered arrangements when selections are unordered
Missing complementary cases

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Probability rules, mutually exclusive and independent events
skills.description: Use addition, multiplication, complement, mutually exclusive and independent event rules.
common_errors: Adding probabilities for non-mutually-exclusive events
Using independence without justification

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Conditional probability and tree diagrams
skills.description: Use tree diagrams, conditional probability and successive selection with or without replacement.
common_errors: Using original denominators after an item is moved
Confusing P(A given B) with P(B given A)

skills.subject_name: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics
skills.name: Repeated trials and first-success probabilities

common_errors: Counting all successes rather than the first success
Forgetting failures before the first success
